name: Athletics
description: Covers difficult situations while climbing, jumping, or swimming, and physical feats like grappling.

name: Acrobatics
description: Staying on your feet in tricky situations, balancing, and performing acrobatic stunts.

name: Sleight of Hand
description: Perform manual trickery like planting an item, palming an object, or picking a pocket or lock without being noticed.

name: Stealth
description: Conceal yourself from enemies, slip past guards, or move silently without being seen or heard.

name: Arcana
description: Recall lore about spells, magic items, eldritch symbols, and the planes of existence.

name: History
description: Recall lore about historical events, legendary people, ancient kingdoms, and past disputes.

name: Investigation
description: Deduce clues, spot hidden details, and draw conclusions from evidence at a scene.

name: Nature
description: Recall lore about terrain, plants, animals, weather, and natural cycles.

name: Religion
description: Recall lore about deities, rites, prayers, religious hierarchies, and holy symbols.

name: Animal Handling
description: Calm a domesticated animal, keep a mount from bolting, or intuit an animal's intentions.

name: Insight
description: Determine the true intentions of a creature, such as spotting a lie or predicting its next move.

name: Medicine
description: Stabilize a dying companion, diagnose an illness, or identify what kind of ailment afflicts someone.

name: Perception
description: Spot, hear, or otherwise detect the presence of something using your senses.

name: Survival
description: Follow tracks, hunt, navigate the wilderness, identify natural hazards, and predict the weather.

name: Deception
description: Convincingly hide the truth, either verbally or through actions, such as bluffing or disguising intent.

name: Intimidation
description: Influence someone through overt threats, hostile actions, or physical violence.

name: Performance
description: Delight an audience with music, dance, acting, storytelling, or other forms of entertainment.

name: Persuasion
description: Influence someone with tact, social grace, or good nature.
